notes:
V1.2 — 2026

🇵🇭 Filipino (Tagalog) language added
• Full UI translation — buttons, dialogs, status messages
• Help text, confirmations, virus list all translated
• Language selector: English · 中文 · ខ្មែរ · Filipino

✔ All V1.1 features included:
• 📸 Screenshot button — auto-saves to Desktop
• SKIP_DB expanded: 100+ worldwide banks protected
• SCREEN tab — no Pillow dependency
• scrcpy — mirror / no-audio / record MP4
• Virus scan — 3 phases (VIRUS_DB + services + keywords)
• TOOLS tab — FRP bypass, WiFi ADB, screen lock remove
• APK install — Unicode/Chinese filename fix
• App list — USER / SYS / DIS / ALL filter + search
• Restart App + Force Stop in log bar
• Auto update checker via GitHub version.json
